disclaimer: This is a diagnostic news score overlay. It is not investment advice, market action guidance, execution guidance, or instructions for changing holdings.
freshness_decay_note: Scores use configurable freshness decay so older classified items have less influence than newer classified items.

high_severity_items.summary: Kansas City Fed President Schmid warns oil price shock may not be transitory, citing elevated baseline inflation and stalled disinflation, reinforcing hawkish monetary policy stance.
high_severity_items.title: Kansas Fed Pres Warns Oil Price Shock Might Not Be Transitory

high_severity_items.summary: Iran war disrupts Strait of Hormuz, removing ~20% of global LNG supply, driving price surges. US LNG exports to Asia increase sharply, but China plans to diversify away from US LNG dependency, indicating future shifts.
high_severity_items.title: America’s LNG Boom Is Real — But China Is Planning Beyond It

high_severity_items.summary: China may resume oil buying after a pause due to high prices, exacerbating energy supply constraints from Middle East conflict.
high_severity_items.title: China’s Oil Buying Pause Won’t Last Forever

high_severity_items.summary: Oil prices plunge ~10% in a week on expectations of a ceasefire extension and partial reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, reducing geopolitical risk and energy supply disruption fears.
high_severity_items.title: Oil Prices Suffer Biggest Weekly Collapse in Two Months

high_severity_items.summary: Cuba's energy crisis deepens due to US fuel blockade and reduced Venezuelan supply, prompting a turn to solar power to address chronic blackouts and economic strain.
high_severity_items.title: Cuba Bets on Solar Power as Energy Crisis Deepens

high_severity_items.summary: Attacks on multiple ships in the Strait of Hormuz, confirmed by Chevron CEO, indicate heightened geopolitical risk and potential energy supply disruption.

high_severity_items.summary: Dell's AI server revenue surged 757% YoY, driving a 32% stock price jump and fastest revenue growth since re-listing, signaling strong AI compute demand.

high_severity_items.summary: A secretive deal between Georgia and Azerbaijan raises energy security concerns in Georgia, highlighting geopolitical risks and potential energy supply disruptions.
high_severity_items.title: Secretive Azerbaijan Deal Raises Energy Security Concerns in Georgia
